C4-FM-01: match objects one to one across sets
restate each set quantity before choosing
C4-FM-02: rehearse more versus less with visual supports
ask which set would have extra objects if matched
C4-FM-03: rearrange the same set while preserving count
compare compact and spread-out layouts of equal sets
ask whether anything was added or removed
C4-FM-04: move from concrete sets to pictures to short stories gradually
anchor each context back to counted sets
